claim_ceiling: Functional Subject OutcomePrediction applied-action local candidate pass
what_changed: OutcomePrediction selected-action policy now applies ViabilityState overrides for evidence ask, initiative suggest, repair checkpoint, and safety checkpoint.
AgentRuntime now converts selected suggest/repair predictions into bounded RESPOND actions that still pass through gate.check and never execute tools or mutate memory/state.
Functional Subject local smoke now records more than one transcript-visible applied outcome_prediction_effect case.

acceptance_result.gate: OutcomePrediction can select suggest and repair/checkpoint actions under clear ViabilityState signals.
acceptance_result.evidence: Deterministic tests cover self-topic suggest, operational-preference suggest, failure repair, and safety checkpoint.

acceptance_result.gate: Selected actions remain advisory/runtime responses only.
acceptance_result.evidence: All new selected actions are AgentAction RESPOND/ASK; no tool execution, memory write, or approval bypass is introduced.
Trace assertions cover applied=true, decision, reason, selected_prediction, selection_policy, and viability_scores.

acceptance_result.gate: Functional Subject report/eval shows more than one applied OutcomePrediction case.
Existing regression profiles do not regress at targeted level.
acceptance_result.evidence: Targeted EgoOperator and run_ego_experience_trial tests passed before closeout.

residuals: This is local/scripted evidence only; real-provider rerun is still required.
Some cases still rely on runtime repair, especially memory/correction/commitment paths.
No durable memory efficacy, live autonomy, or stable user benefit is proven.
